auth.resetSubtitle: We'll send you a reset link
auth.tagline: Teach what you know. Learn what you need.
auth.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errBadCredentials: That email and password didn't match.
auth.errEmailExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.hintResetPw: Forgot your password, or signed up with Google?
auth.successSignup: Account created! Check your email for a confirmation link, then sign in.
auth.successReset: Password reset link sent — check your inbox.
auth.successResend: Confirmation email re-sent — check your inbox (and spam).

onboarding.step1Subtitle: Answer a few questions, then add what you can teach.
onboarding.learnTitle: What do you want to learn?
onboarding.learnSubtitle: Search anything. Can't find it? Add it.
onboarding.proficiencySubtitle: Helps us match you with the right learners.
onboarding.aboutSubtitle: Helps us match you locally. Only your city & language are used for matching — the rest is optional.
onboarding.teachSearchHint: Search or add anything — a language, a craft, a niche skill.
onboarding.noTeachSkills: No teaching skills — tap continue. You can add some anytime.
onboarding.cityHint: Used to match you with people nearby. City-level only — never your exact location.
onboarding.languagesHint: First selected is your main language. You can teach & learn across all of them.
onboarding.optionalHint: Helps us show our community impact to partners who fund free learning. Skip if you prefer.
onboarding.welcomeBody: Teach an hour, earn one back. Time is your currency.

home.coldStartTitle: You're early — that's a good thing.
home.coldStartBody: You've got {amount} TC ready to spend. Here's how to get going:
home.setAvailabilityHint: So learners can book you — and you earn TC
home.exploreSkillsHint: See what you could learn right now
home.addSkillsHint: The more you teach, the faster you earn
home.noTeachers: No teachers in {category} yet. Try another category or check back soon.

tour.balanceBody: Earn 1 by teaching an hour, spend 1 to learn. This is your balance — start with a few on us.
tour.levelBody: Teach, learn, keep streaks — climb from Time Seed all the way to TimeBank Legend.
tour.profileBody: Skills, badges and settings. Add what you can teach so learners can find you.
